Event: Royal Challenge - Season 27
Event Date: 01/07/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: RI109
Scarlet Drop Ring

Once in a while, the unit launches blobs of water at all units in a small radius around the unit. If a blob hits an enemy, that enemy gains withering. It removes a random buff from that enemy and reduces their damage by 50% and health by 25% for 5 sec. Additionally, that enemy takes 150000 pure damage. If a blob hits an ally, it casts restoration on that ally. It removes a random debuff and restores 150000 health. Additionally, their damage increases by 50% and health by 25% for 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
